description: Agent coordination layer. Declares available dream agents, their surface bindings, and current operational states.

agents.name: Dream Chat Agent
agents.description: Primary dream chat interface. Streams responses from the active provider through the selected narrator persona. Includes Three Doors game with merged LLM+engine routing.

bang_commands.!three-doors: Start or continue Three Doors game. Routes to lantern-csf-dream (Ollama) → Python ThreeDoorsEngine fallback.
bang_commands.!autoupdate: Pull latest code, install deps, restart server.

agents.name: Three Doors Game Agent
agents.description: Three Doors Game with merged routing. Primary: lantern-csf-dream Ollama model (mistral base, game system prompt + active Elephant Oasis state). Fallback: Python ThreeDoorsEngine scripted state machine.

routing.final_fallback: local_fallback reply with last known door state from door_state.json
routing.door_format: [DOORS: A <name> | B <name> | C <name>] — parsed client + server side into clickable chips
routing.active_state: Elephant Oasis (2026-06-08) — dad elephant scene, next: Ancient Memory / Peace's Whisper / Serenity's Embrace

agents.name: Dream Journal Agent
agents.description: Local-first journal capture and analytics. Works entirely offline — no provider required.

agents.name: Unified Greeter
agents.description: Generates the opening greeting using recent journal context. Always available — no provider needed.

agents.name: Dreamer Notebook Agent
agents.description: Per-user dream notebook storage. JSONL-backed, per-user file.

agents.name: Work Dispatcher
agents.description: Background job dispatcher. Wakes sleeping agents when work queues, sleeps when idle. Requires Redis. Currently stopped.

agents.name: Tesseract Listener
agents.description: Background listener daemon that refreshes agent-checkin-manifest, monitors dollhouse segments, and holds the tesseract listener lock. Started via scripts/Start-TesseractListener.ps1.
